changelog:
* **feat: add real-time ntfy listener** (0a12980)
  - Create NtfyStreamListener singleton object in study.tanvir.info package
  - Open HTTP streaming connection to https://ntfy.sh/tanvir007_cq_ota/json
  - Run HTTP streaming request on a dedicated background executor thread
  - Set read timeout to zero to keep stream connection active indefinitely
  - Configure Accept header to application/x-ndjson for streaming JSON events
  - Read incoming stream line by line using BufferedReader stream reader
  - Parse incoming line-delimited JSON payloads using JSONObject
  - Filter stream events specifically for event: message type notifications
  - Extract title and message properties from received ntfy push payloads
  - Log instant OTA notification events with title and body information
  - Trigger UpdateChecker.checkForUpdates(context) immediately upon event arrival
  - Implement exponential backoff strategy for stream connection retries
  - Set initial retry delay to 5 seconds and double delay up to 60 seconds max
  - Reset retry delay back to 5 seconds upon successful stream connection
  - Register ConnectivityManager.NetworkCallback to monitor internet availability
  - Re-establish stream connection automatically when internet becomes available
  - Unregister network callback cleanly when stream listener stops
  - Use AtomicBoolean flags for thread-safe state management (isRunning, isConnected)
  - Add checkForUpdates(context: Context) overload in UpdateChecker.kt
  - Execute background version check without requiring active Activity instance
  - Start NtfyStreamListener in MainActivity.kt onCreate alongside OtaCheckWorker
  - Retain OtaCheckWorker 15-minute periodic check as fallback mechanism
